/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation  -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g  -Wl,--build-id=sha1 CMakeFiles/routertest_harness_designator.dir/test_designator.cc.o -o ../../../../runtime_output_directory/routertest_harness_designator  -Wl,-rpath,/tmp/mysql/cmake-build-mysql-docker/library_output_directory ../shared/libtest-helpers.a ../../../../library_output_directory/libmysqlharness_stdx.so.1 ../../../../library_output_directory/libmysqlharness.so.1 ../../../../libgmock.a ../../../../libgtest.a -ldl ../../../../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libmytime.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libzlib.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libzstd.a -lm /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so ../../../../archive_output_directory/libbacktrace.a
